opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like a hot knife is twisting in my lower left side, and I cannot stop shivering.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain in my lower left belly has been getting worse for a day now, I've got a high fever with shakes, and I can't keep any food down.

symptom_narrative.duration: a day and getting steadily worse
symptom_narrative.character: severe, constant, like a hot knife twisting; it does not come and go
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've had — I can't stand up straight and I'm stuck in bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down on the left side of my belly, in one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, no let-up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I took some paracetamol about four hours ago and it did nothing for the pain or the fever
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, and even the thought of eating
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: high fever with chills and shivering/shakes, feeling really nauseous, no appetite at all, and I haven't been able to open my bowels for about four days
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm bedbound, curled up guarding my left side, and I need help just to get to the bathroom

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: little pouches in my lower bowel (diverticulosis) that they found by chance on a screening colonoscopy about three years ago — I've never had any trouble from them until now
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: about 3 years ago on a screening colonoscopy
past_medical_history.how_managed: no treatment, just told they were there

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse who is present and very worried about how quickly things are getting worse; needs help to mobilise to the bathroom

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer; the patient also reports feeling hot with chills and rigors

objective_data_offered.value: looks flushed and sweaty, lying curled up on the left side, clearly in a lot of pain and unable to straighten up
spouse reports he is shivering and shaking, hasn't eaten or drunk much, and has a heating pad pressed on his belly
